summary: Iteration 17 Testing COMPLETED: Member Types Permissions & Page Access feature fully implemented and working. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Member Types form has 3 tabs (General, Permissions, Page Access), all 10 permission radio buttons present, page access checklist working. Members Membership Info tab correctly has permission radios REMOVED and shows inherited permissions as read-only badges when Member Type is selected.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/member-types returns list with permission fields
Backend: POST /api/admin/member-types creates type with permissions and allowed_pages
Backend: PUT /api/admin/member-types/:id updates permissions and allowed_pages
Backend: Member type response includes all 10 permission fields
Backend: POST /api/admin/members creates member with member_type_id
Backend: Member creation works without individual permission fields (inherited from type)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns _member_type with permissions and allowed_pages
Backend: GET /api/member/me returns _member_type with permissions and allowed_pages
Backend: GET /api/public/site-pages returns pages for checklist
Backend: Member has all required membership fields (level, ranking, status, fee, dates, type, sponsor, mentor)
Frontend: Member Types Manager page loads at /admin/member-types
Frontend: Member Types table shows Order, Name, Permissions, Pages, Actions columns
Frontend: Add Type button opens dialog with 3 tabs
Frontend: General tab has Name, Description, Order fields

Frontend: Permissions tab has all 10 permission radio buttons (Corporate, Mentor, Portfolio Development, Application Reviewer, Opportunities Development, Opportunities Reviewer, Project Development, Project Reviewer, Project Management, Content Operator)
Frontend: Page Access tab has checklist of site pages (Home, News, Gallery, Reading List, Terms, Privacy, KLS)
Frontend: Members Membership Info tab has Level, Ranking, Status, Fee, Active Date, Expiration Date, Member Type dropdown, Sponsor, Mentor
Frontend: Members Membership Info tab does NOT have old permission radio buttons (correctly removed)
Frontend: When Member Type is selected, inherited permissions shown as read-only badges
Frontend: Inherited permissions section shows 'Inherited from type X:' with permission badges and page count
seed_data_creation: Existing seeded member types: Individual, Corporate, Institutional, Key Member
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified: (1) MemberTypesManager at /admin/member-types has 3 tabs - General (name, description, order), Permissions (10 yes/no radios for corporate, is_mentor, portfolio_development, application_reviewer, opportunities_development, opportunities_reviewer, project_development, project_reviewer, project_management, content_operator), Page Access (checklist from site-pages API). (2) MembersManager Membership Info tab NO LONGER has the permission radio grid - those fields were removed. The tab now shows 'Inherited from type X' badges when a member_type_id is selected, displaying active permissions and page count. (3) Backend /auth/me and /member/me endpoints return _member_type object with name, allowed_pages array, and permissions dict when member has member_type_id. (4) Member Types table shows permissions count and pages count per type.

members_membership_tab.inherited_permissions_display: Shows 'Inherited from type X:' with permission badges and page count when Member Type is selected

api_endpoints.auth_me: Returns _member_type with name, allowed_pages, permissions when member has member_type_id
api_endpoints.member_me: Returns _member_type with name, allowed_pages, permissions when member has member_type_id
api_endpoints.admin_member_types: Full CRUD with permissions and allowed_pages fields
